title: Add emergency services phone numbers (911) to Town Services section

requirements.summary: Update the Town Services page to display dedicated emergency services listings for Sheriff, Fire Department, and Ambulance with clickable 911 phone links, ensuring visual prominence and consistency with the Northern Maine theme
acceptanceCriteria: The Town Services page lists three emergency service entries: Sheriff, Fire Department, and Ambulance.
Each emergency service entry displays a clickable phone link using 'tel:911' that dials 911 on mobile devices.
The emergency services section is visually distinct (e.g., highlighted or grouped under an 'Emergency Services' heading) and easy to locate on the page.
The existing 911 emergency banner on the Services page is preserved or enhanced, not removed.
Styling remains consistent with the deep forest green, slate gray, and warm wood-toned theme.

file_operations.description: Add a dedicated Emergency Services section below the existing emergency banner that displays three service entries (Sheriff, Fire Department, Ambulance) with service names and clickable tel:911 phone links. Group these entries under a visually prominent 'Emergency Services' heading with styling that uses the existing Northern Maine theme colors (forest green, slate gray). Ensure the section is positioned prominently on the page and the emergency banner remains intact.
